brand: Trend Hotels and Suites by My Place

notes.title: Principal Activity and Significant Accounting Policies

revenue_recognition.franchise_fees: Recognized on straight-line basis over franchise term (10 years for Trend, 20 years for My Place). Initial application fees are fixed consideration recognized over contractual term.
revenue_recognition.development_fees: Nonrefundable, deferred and recognized as franchise fee revenue on straight-line basis over 20 years.
revenue_recognition.royalty_fees: Variable, sales-based, recognized over time as services rendered. Not charged until occupancy reaches specified level.
revenue_recognition.marketing_fees: Based on fixed % of GRR. Portion deferred until surplus fees are spent in subsequent period.
revenue_recognition.loyalty_program_fees: Portion deferred until points redeemed or expire. Breakage estimated based on historical experience.
revenue_recognition.training_fees: Recognized at point in time, at conclusion of each day of training.
revenue_recognition.conference_fees: Recognized at point in time, at conclusion of event. Conference held every 18-24 months.

impairment.policy: Carrying value reviewed for impairment when events indicate non-recoverability. Loss recognized when undiscounted expected cash flows < carrying value.

income_taxes.policy: Taxable income/loss allocated to members per ownership percentages

leases.policy: ROU assets and lease liabilities recognized for terms > 12 months. Short-term exemption elected for ≤12 months.
leases.reason: All leases are short-term cancelable (30-day notice) with related parties

policies.cash_and_equivalents: Highly liquid investments with original maturity ≤ 3 months
policies.accounts_receivable: Unpaid fees from franchisees and related party reimbursements. Collected within 30 days generally. No interest on overdue.
policies.franchise_fee_receivable: Unpaid fees deferred by jurisdiction requirements or development agreement conditions. No interest charged.

allowance_for_credit_losses.method: Historical loss rates. No adjustment for current/forecasted conditions (consistent with historical)

contract_acquisition_costs.components: Sales commissions, sub-franchise fees, territorial fee rebates
contract_acquisition_costs.sub_franchise_fee: Paid to outside party for each initial franchise sold after April 2013

territorial_royalty_rebates.rate: 1% royalty fee rebate for 20 years after hotel reaches specified occupancy

members_equity.distribution_allocation: Per membership interest unless for tax obligations or 60% Class A vote

policies.use_of_estimates: Management estimates and assumptions required. Actual results may differ.
policies.reclassifications: Certain reclassifications made for consistency. No impact on net income or equity.

detail.cash_deposits_in_related_party_account: At times held in combined bank account owned by The Rivett Group. Balance was $0 at year-end 2024, 2023, 2022.

detail.point_in_time_components: Conference fees, training fees, other income

advertising_fund_accounting: Marketing fees partially deferred when surplus exists. Recognized into revenue when surplus fees are spent in subsequent period.
